$comment: QA tier → gate matrix. Authoritative per DEV_QA-1 fix. qa:* label on the Paperclip issue selects which row applies. Unknown/missing label → qa:functional (default). install=frozen runs pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; install=install_only runs install but skips all gates. lint_scope=pr_diff lints only files changed vs origin/main; lint_scope=repo runs repo-wide; lint=none skips lint entirely. tests values: skip|yes. visual values: off|on. build values: skip|yes.

qa:none.description: Docs / comments / non-runtime changes. Auto-approve after install verification.

qa:build.description: Refactor, dead-code cleanup, type-only changes. Compile must succeed; no behavior tests.

qa:functional.description: DEFAULT. Any backend or logic change. Build + PR-diff lint + unit/functional tests, no visual.

qa:visual.description: UI / CSS / layout-affecting frontend changes. All gates, including Playwright visual diff.

qa:quality.description: Repo-wide code-quality sweep. Runs lint across the entire repo, not just PR-diff. Use only when explicitly labeled.
